headline: UBS Upgrades GE HealthCare Techs to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $69
summary: UBS  analyst Graham Doyle   upgrades GE HealthCare Techs (NASDAQ:GEHC) from Sell to Neutral and lowers the price target from $75 to $69.
